item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]

item.title: Camera Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytool
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]
item.description:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]

item.title: DNS INJECTOR [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: DNS INJECTOR [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
DNS INJECTOR
(Virtualization)
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GS DNS [/color][color=#008000] INJECTOR [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596767/]1.Game Graphic Unlicker [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596710/]3.GODSPEED MODE [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

GS DNS Injector, developed by @revWhiteShadow, is a versatile and powerful module designed to enhance your DNS (Domain Name System) configuration. By utilizing this tool, you can effortlessly switch between various DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS.

The GS DNS Injector empowers users to modify their DNS settings easily, providing an efficient means to enhance their internet browsing experience. By choosing different DNS servers, users can potentially optimize their network performance, improve security, and gain access to advanced features provided by these DNS providers.

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.

Title: Elevate Your Internet Experience with GS DNS Injector: The Ultimate DNS Configuration Tool

Introducing GS DNS Injector, a groundbreaking Magisk module developed by @revWhiteShadow, engineered to revolutionize your DNS (Domain Name System) settings. With this versatile tool at your disposal, you gain the power to seamlessly switch between top-tier DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS, unleashing a new realm of possibilities for optimizing your internet connectivity.

Effortless DNS Configuration
With GS DNS Injector, modifying your DNS settings has never been easier. Say goodbye to the hassle of manual configuration and hello to a user-friendly interface that empowers you to customize your DNS preferences with just a few taps. Whether you're seeking enhanced speed, improved security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, GS DNS Injector puts the power in your hands.

Optimize Your Browsing Experience
By leveraging the capabilities of GS DNS Injector, you can supercharge your internet browsing experience in ways you never thought possible. Choose from a range of DNS servers tailored to your specific needs, whether it's boosting speed, fortifying security, or eliminating pesky advertisements that clutter your screen. With GS DNS Injector, the choice is yours.
Advanced Ads Blocking
Tired of being bombarded with intrusive ads while surfing the web? GS DNS Injector has you covered. With its built-in ads blocker DNS feature, you can bid farewell to unwanted advertisements that disrupt your browsing sessions. Enjoy a cleaner, more streamlined online experience as you navigate the web with ease.

### Seamless Integration
GS DNS Injector seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, ensuring a smooth installation process and compatibility with a wide range of Android devices. Simply download the module, install it using Magisk Manager, and unlock a world of possibilities for enhancing your DNS configuration.

Elevate Your Connectivity with GS DNS Injector
Whether you're a casual user looking to optimize your browsing experience or a tech enthusiast seeking advanced DNS management capabilities, GS DNS Injector is the ultimate solution. Join the ranks of satisfied users who have transformed their internet connectivity with this powerful Magisk module. Experience the difference today and take control of your DNS configuration like never before.

[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.description:
DNS INJECTOR
(Virtualization)

Say goodbye to the hassle of manual configuration and hello to a user-friendly interface that empowers you to customize your DNS preferences with just a few taps. For 32-bit systems:

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]

[read more]

item.title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.

item.title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:

(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/

432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

item.title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]
item.description:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]

item.title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions

(Science)

item.title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: hitokiri-2
item.itunes:summary:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.description:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]

item.title: GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL
(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL
(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:

For 32-bit systems:

./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]

Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.

For 32-bit systems:

bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]

Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS GMS DOZE UNIVERSAL
(Virtualization)
Here I'll Upload some necessary modules and apps.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
